docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLEMAN, TYEISHA AS TO DEFENDANT BOWDRY, CLARK JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
